description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist facade. The front features a paved driveway with two parked cars, a small landscaped area with shrubs, and a central entryway flanked by large windows. The left side of the house includes a balcony with outdoor seating and a canopy, while the rear has wide glass doors opening to what appears to be a living or dining area. The windows are arranged in both horizontal and vertical strips, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, and the overall design emphasizes geometric lines and open spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a balcony, and a driveway with two cars in front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with two cars, landscaped path, and a balcony on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the driveway, side windows, and a tree near the edge of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying wide glass doors, vertical window strips, and a glimpse into the interior layout.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the balcony with canopy, side windows, and the driveway with cars visible in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a single door, flanked by large windows, accessed via a paved path with steps and minimal decorative elements.
